title: Enter Excessively Long Text in Test Case Title Description Field
description: Verify that entering a string exceeding the maximum allowed character limit in the test case title/description field triggers a character-limit error and prevents generation.
expected_result: The system blocks form submission, shows a clear 'Description must not exceed 2000 characters' error, and the character counter indicates an exceeded state.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generation page
test_steps.expected: Test case generation page is displayed

test_steps.action: Fill the title/description override field with a 2001-character string
test_steps.expected: Overlong text is entered into the description field

test_steps.action: Click the Generate Test Cases button
test_steps.expected: Form submission is blocked and a character-limit error appears

test_steps.action: Verify the character limit error message
test_steps.expected: Error message indicates the maximum character limit has been exceeded

test_steps.action: Confirm the character counter turns red or shows an exceeded state
test_steps.expected: Character counter reflects an over-limit state
